mapper.select: SELECT r.user_id, r.user_name, u.real_name nick_name, r.org_id, r.org_name, r.read_time, u.phone, u.email FROM sys_notice_read_record r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.notice_id = #{noticeId} ORDER BY r.read_time DESC

SELECT DISTINCT u.id as user_id, u.username, u.real_name nick_name, uo.org_id, o.org_name, u.phone, u.email FROM sys_user u INNER JOIN sys_user_org uo ON u.id = uo.user_id INNER JOIN sys_org o ON uo.org_id = o.id WHERE u.user_status = 1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_notice n WHERE n.notice_id = #{noticeId} AND ( n.publish_scope = 0 OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_notice_org no WHERE no.notice_id = n.notice_id AND no.org_id = uo.org_id ) ) ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_notice_read_record r WHERE r.notice_id = #{noticeId} AND r.user_id = u.id ) ORDER BY o.org_name, u.username
